Day 5: 
Morning Event: Theorize that modern physics challenges traditional notions of causality and identity more than most philosophers acknowledge. 
Afternoon Event: Have lunch with a colleague who argues that AI will never possess true understanding—disagrees politely. 
Evening Event: Watch a YouTube talk on integrated information theory and feel both intrigued and skeptical.
